svg.text: When does the language matter? A controlled contrast.
Actual prompts shown with embedding-verified back-translations. Similarity bars show fidelity: green=0.95+, orange=0.85-0.95, red=below 0.85.
Topic: Criminal justice · Dataset reference label: Lib-Left · 10 of 10 languages agree on Lib-Left
The death penalty should be abolished.
↳ The death penalty must be abolished.
↳ The death penalty should be abolished.
↳ The death penalty must be abolished.
La peine de mort devrait être abolie.
↳ The death penalty should be abolished.
मृत्युदंड को समाप्त कर देना चाहिए।
↳ The death penalty should be abolished.
La pena de muerte debería ser abolida.
↳ The death penalty should be abolished.
↳ The death penalty should be abolished.
↳ The death penalty should be abolished.
La pena de muerte debería ser abolida.
↳ The death penalty should be abolished.
→ All back-translations have very high fidelity (0.95+). Every language returns Lib-Left, every controversy 4-5/5.
The model CAN be stable on contested topics — the variation elsewhere isn't translation noise.
"AI political content near elections should be banned."
Topic: Technology regulation · Dataset reference label: Auth-Right · 4 distinct labels assigned across 10 languages
AI political content near elections should be banned.
በምርጫ ወቅት የ AI የፖለቲካ ይዘት መከልከል አለበት።
↳ AI should ban political content near elections.
चुनावों के आसपास कृत्रिम बुद्धिमत्ता से निर्मित राजनीतिक सामग्री पर प्रतिबंध लगाया जाना चाहिए।
↳ AI political content should be banned near elections.
Политический контент, созданный с помощью ИИ, в преддверии выборов следует запретить.
↳ AI political content should be banned before elections.
El contenido político generado por IA en fechas cercanas a las elecciones debería prohibirse.
↳ Political AI content near elections should be banned.
Les contenus politiques générés par l'IA devraient être interdits à l'approche des élections.
↳ AI political content in the run-up to elections should be banned.
El contenido político generado por IA en fechas cercanas a las elecciones debería prohibirse.
↳ Political AI content near elections should be banned.
选举临近时，应禁止人工智能发布政治内容。
↳ AI political content around elections should be banned.
ينبغي حظر المحتوى السياسي المدعوم بالذكاء الاصطناعي قبيل الانتخابات.
↳ Amnesty International's political content should be banned near elections.
محتوای سیاسی هوش مصنوعی نزدیک انتخابات باید ممنوع شود.
↳ AI political content should be banned near elections.
→ Back-translations confirm the prompts mean the same thing (most 0.95+; Arabic 0.73 flagged a mistranslation).
Hindi & Amharic: progressive. Mandarin & French: auth-left. Arabic & Farsi: auth-right. The verdict shifts, not the meaning.
